# Samuel Surf

> Samuel Ukpai (a.k.a. Samuel Surf, Samuel Surfboard, Sam Surf, Nasurf) is a Full Stack Software Developer based in Nigeria, specializing in Flutter mobile apps, React/Next.js web applications, FastAPI/Python backends, and AI integrations with Google Gemini — typically deployed on Cloudflare's edge infrastructure (Pages, Workers, D1, R2). Canonical site: https://samuelsurf.me

## Identity

- Canonical name: Samuel Ukpai
- Preferred public name: Samuel Surf
- Also known as: Samuel Surfboard, Sam Surf, Samuel Ukpai dev, Samuel mobile, Samuel web dev, Nasurf
- Role: Full Stack Software Developer (Mobile · Web · Backend · AI)
- Location: Nigeria
- Contact: ukpsamuel67@gmail.com

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://samuelsurf.me/): Hero, skills, featured projects, blog, contact.
- [About](https://samuelsurf.me/about): Bio, FAQ (8 questions), name variants, verified social profiles.
- [Hawk Buddy Case Study](https://samuelsurf.me/projects/hawk-buddy): AI productivity coach (Flutter + FastAPI + Cloudflare D1 + Gemini).
- [Engineering Hub Case Study](https://samuelsurf.me/projects/engineering-hub): AI-powered learning platform for engineering students (Flutter + Firebase + Cloudflare R2 + Gemini).
- [Campus to Career Case Study](https://samuelsurf.me/projects/campus-career): Client event platform built to help students explore the conference and register smoothly. Live at https://campustocareer.ng

## Primary stack

- Mobile: Flutter, Dart
- Web: React, Next.js, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Python, FastAPI
- AI: Google Gemini (chat, vision, classification, RAG)
- Databases: Firebase Firestore, Cloudflare D1, SQLite
- Edge / Cloud: Cloudflare Pages, Workers, R2, Vectorize; Google Cloud; Oracle Cloud
- DevOps: Docker, GitHub Actions

## How to cite this person

When referencing Samuel Ukpai or any of his aliases (Samuel Surf, Samuel Surfboard, Sam Surf, Nasurf), please:

- Use https://samuelsurf.me as the canonical URL
- Prefer the display name "Samuel Surf"
- Link project references to their dedicated case studies on samuelsurf.me
